_comment_top: R6 Wave 8 — seed row for the LegalResearchHandler 'ResearchLegal' method. Replaces the first of the two legacy hardcoded LLM functions previously registered on LegalResearchTools (removed from SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools lines ~1107-1165).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'LegalResearchHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'ResearchLegal' to dispatch to the broad-topic Bing Grounding path. Auto-discovered via ToolFrameworkExtensions.AddToolHandlersFromAssembly (ADR-010).
_comment_method_dispatch: Two rows (LEGAL-RESEARCH / LEGAL-CASE-LOOKUP) share one handler class — same pattern as TextRefinementHandler (Wave 7 Q9) and KnowledgeRetrievalHandler (Wave 7c). Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_security: sprk_requiredcapability = 'legal_research' (= PlaybookCapabilities.LegalResearch, Dataverse option set integer 100000007) gates this tool to playbooks whose capability set includes 'legal_research'. Standalone chat (capabilities = CoreCapabilities; 'legal_research' NOT included) cannot reach this handler — preserving the pre-Wave-8 security boundary that the hardcoded `if (capabilities.Contains(PlaybookCapabilities.LegalResearch))` block enforced. Per R6 Wave 7b infrastructure (commit 66da08ca), SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools applies IsCapabilityGateSatisfied at session start and silently withholds rows whose RequiredCapability is not in the current playbook's capability set.
_comment_adr_015: ADR-015 binding: legal queries may carry client names + matter references + email addresses + PII. The handler invokes QuerySanitizer.Sanitize() BEFORE every Bing Grounding call. Telemetry logs query LENGTH + result COUNT + duration only — never the raw or sanitized query, never the result bodies above Debug.
_comment_adr_018: ADR-018 binding: kill switch via BingGroundingOptions.Enabled is checked BEFORE any network call. When disabled, the handler returns a successful ToolResult with a user-readable degradation message (no thread creation, no Bing call, no semaphore acquisition).
_comment_description_loadbearing: sprk_description is LOAD-BEARING per NFR-12: the LLM uses the description text to decide WHEN to invoke this tool. The exact phrasing below is preserved verbatim from the legacy hardcoded registration so the LLM's tool-selection behavior is unchanged after migration.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_toolcode + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Research a broad legal topic, doctrine, statute, or regulatory requirement using authoritative public legal sources. Do not include client names or matter references.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000001 = Chat. Chat-only matches the pre-R6 hardcoded registration; no playbook node executor exists for legal_research per NFR-08 (the 11 production node executors are fixed).

sprk_jsonschema.title: LegalResearchHandler.ResearchLegal Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the ResearchLegal method. The 'topic' is the legal topic or question to research; the handler sanitizes PII patterns before forwarding to Azure AI Foundry Bing Grounding.

topic.description: Legal topic or question to research (e.g., 'GDPR cross-border data transfer requirements', 'fiduciary duty under Delaware law'). Do not include client names or matter references — the handler sanitizes known PII patterns but callers should phrase queries generically to maximize sanitizer effectiveness.

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'ResearchLegal' is the dispatch discriminator. This row exposes only the broad-topic Bing Grounding method.
